## Problem

What workflow is currently hard or missing?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Helps

Explain the value for tracing, debugging, or day-to-day usage.

## Extra Context

Add screenshots, examples, or trace snippets if helpful.
